corrections.text: The article states that Ore Energy 'is a science startup spun out of TU Delft and was founded in 2022, according to Energy-Storage.News.' The 'founded in 2022' detail is supported by Energy-Storage.News, but the 'spun out of TU Delft' detail is not in that source; it is reported by Silicon Canals (also cited in the article), which states Ore Energy is 'a science startup spun out of TU Delft.' Both facts are accurate; the TU Delft clause should have been attributed to Silicon Canals.
